title: cleanup: remove Polar references and fix tier management skill
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We've swept out the old Polar integration scripts and polished up our internal tier management tools. A cleaner codebase means a happier hive!
gist.summary: Removed deprecated Polar integration scripts and updated internal tier management tools to include the new microbe tier.
gist.impact: Internal agent skills and scripts are now cleaner, more secure against SQL injection, and fully aligned with the current tier system.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some spring cleaning, sweeping up old code blocks and organizing internal tools. Represents the removal of deprecated scripts and general codebase cleanup.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up dusty old code blocks with a small broom. A chunky retro server rack glows softly in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up dusty old code blocks with a small broom. A chunky retro server rack glows softly in the background.
